name: How long do I have to file a warehouse injury claim after the accident?
description: Utah: 4 yrs personal injury, 1 yr workers' comp; file ASAP.[4]

mainEntity.name: How long do I have to file a warehouse injury claim after the accident?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah: 4 yrs personal injury, 1 yr workers' comp; file ASAP.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: **In Utah, the statute of limitations for personal injury suits is 4 years; workers' comp claims must be filed within 1 year of accident or knowledge of injury.** Idaho follows similar timelines, often 1 year for comp.[3][4] Key factors: delayed reporting can bar claims; pre-existing conditions may complicate timing. Act fast to avoid denial; gather medical records early. Missing deadlines forfeits benefits - start now.[4]
